resources.name: Unit Circle Explorer
resources.description:
Sine, cosine, and tangent sweep visualization.

Great for understanding basic trigonometric relationships.

resources.name: Derivative Slope Grapher
resources.description:
Secant and tangent limits simulation.

Manipulate points to visualize instantaneous rate of change.

resources.name: Quadratic Solver Visual
resources.description: Shift parabolas using direct variable sliders.

resources.name: Pythagoras Theorem Proof
resources.description: Interactive visual proof of geometric squares.

resources.name: Projectile Motion Simulator
resources.description: Launch projectiles with customizable velocity, launch angle, and mass to study parabolic trajectory dynamics.

resources.name: Wave Interference Lab
resources.description: Study light, sound, and water waves. Manipulate frequency, amplitude, and double-slits to study interference patterns.
